vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-24067 - Slate Digital Connect macOS XPC PID validation privilege escalation
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-24067
  
Published : June 10, 2026, 12:16 p.m. | 17 minutes ago
  
Description :Slate Digital Connect 1.37.0 for macOS installs a privileged helper tool, com.slatedigital.connect.privileged.helper.tool, which exposes the XPC service com.slatedigital.connect.privileged.helper.tool2. The helper validates connecting XPC clients by obtaining the client's process identifier and using it to retrieve code-signing information for the process. This PID-based client validation is subject to a time-of-check time-of-use race condition because process identifiers can be reused. A local attacker can exploit PID reuse so that validation is performed against a trusted process instead of the original connecting process. This allows unauthorized access to privileged helper functionality and may lead to local privilege escalation.
  
Severity: 0.0 | NA
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-11853 - Debusine Arbitrary File Overwrite via Path Traversal
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-11853
  
Published : June 10, 2026, 10:16 a.m. | 14 minutes ago
  
Description :Debusine is an integrated solution to build, distribute and maintain a Debian-based distribution. Debian source packages (.dsc) and upload artifacts (.changes) are manifest files that name the files that make up the artifact. The parser used to read these files in Debusine accepted arbitrary fully user-controlled paths. The mergeuploads task could be abused to create arbitrary symbolic links on a worker, overwriting any file that the worker user has access to.
  
Severity: 0.0 | NA

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-9019 - Easy Image Collage <= 1.13.6 - Authenticated (Author+) Stored Cross-Site Scripting via 'grid[properties][borderColor]' and 'grid[images][N][attachment_url]' Parameters
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-9019
  
Published : June 10, 2026, 8:16 a.m. | 15 minutes ago
  
Description :The Easy Image Collage plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via 'grid[properties][borderColor]' and 'grid[images][N][attachment_url]' Parameters in all versions up to, and including, 1.13.6 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with author-level access and above, to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that will execute whenever a user accesses an injected page. Because the data is stored via update_post_meta() rather than wp_insert_post() post content, WordPress's unfiltered_html restriction does not apply, meaning Authors cannot be blocked from this attack path by capability controls alone.
  
Severity: 6.4 | MEDIUM
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...
vulnerability.title_ko: CVE-2026-9019 - 손쉬운 이미지 콜라주 <= 1.13.6 - 'grid[properties][borderColor]' 및 'grid[images][N][attachment_url]' 매개변수를 통해 인증된(Author +) 저장 교차 사이트 스크립팅
vulnerability.summary_ko:
CVE ID:CVE-2026-9019
  
게시일 : 2026년 6월 10일 오전 8시 16분 | 15분 전
  
설명:WordPress용 Easy Image Collage 플러그인은 불충분한 입력 삭제 및 출력 이스케이프 처리로 인해 1.13.6까지의 모든 버전에서 'grid[properties][borderColor]' 및 'grid[images][N][attachment_url]' 매개변수를 통한 Stored Cross-Site Scripting에 취약합니다. 이를 통해 작성자 수준 이상의 액세스 권한을 가진 인증된 공격자가 사용자가 삽입된 페이지에 액세스할 때마다 실행되는 임의의 웹 스크립트를 페이지에 삽입할 수 있습니다. 데이터는 wp_insert_post() 게시물 콘텐츠가 아닌 update_post_meta()를 통해 저장되기 때문에 WordPress의 unfiltered_html 제한이 적용되지 않습니다. 즉, 기능 제어만으로 작성자를 이 공격 경로에서 차단할 수 없습니다.
  
심각도: 6.4 | 중간
  
  CVSS 세부 정보, 영향을 받는 제품, 타임라인 등과 같은 자세한 내용을 보려면 링크를 방문하세요.

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-8853 - MW WP Form <= 5.1.3 - Authenticated (Editor+) Stored Cross-Site Scripting via 'memo' Parameter
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-8853
  
Published : June 10, 2026, 8:16 a.m. | 15 minutes ago
  
Description :The MW WP Form plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'memo' parameter in all versions up to, and including, 5.1.3 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with editor-level access and above, to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that will execute whenever a user accesses an injected page. Because the memo value is stored via update_post_meta() rather than wp_insert_post(), WordPress's built-in kses and unfiltered_html protections do not apply, allowing attackers to break out of the textarea element via injected closing tags regardless of role-based content filtering.
  
Severity: 4.4 | MEDIUM
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...

vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-9067
  
Published : June 10, 2026, 7:16 a.m. | 1 hour, 15 minutes ago
  
Description :The Schema & Structured Data for WP & AMP WordPress plugin before 1.60 does not check user capabilities on its frontend AJAX file-upload handlers and does not validate the actual content of uploaded files against the endpoint's intended media type, allowing unauthenticated users to upload any file type accepted by WordPress's media library through endpoints that should only accept images or videos.
  
Severity: 0.0 | NA

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-10846 - Insufficient verification that responses belong to a query
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-10846
  
Published : June 10, 2026, 7:16 a.m. | 1 hour, 15 minutes ago
  
Description :NLnet Labs ldns 1.2.0 up to and including versions 1.9.0, when used in applications as (stub) resolver over UDP, lacks matching the query destination address and port with the response source address and port. Furthermore not the query ID, neither the question of the query is matched with that of the response. This makes applications, that use ldns for (stub) resolver functionality over UDP, vulnerable for off-path poisoning attacks. The drill tool, which is shipped with ldns, suffers from this vulnerability.
  
Severity: 8.2 | HIGH
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...
vulnerability.title_ko: CVE-2026-10846 - 응답이 쿼리에 속하는지 확인이 충분하지 않습니다.
vulnerability.summary_ko:
CVE ID:CVE-2026-10846
  
게시일 : 2026년 6월 10일 오전 7시 16분 | 1시간, 15분 전
  
설명:NLnet Labs ldns 1.2.0(버전 1.9.0 포함)은 애플리케이션에서 UDP를 통한 (스텁) 해석기로 사용될 때 쿼리 대상 주소 및 포트가 응답 소스 주소 및 포트와 일치하지 않습니다. 또한 쿼리 ID가 아니며 쿼리의 질문이 응답의 질문과 일치하지 않습니다. 이로 인해 UDP를 통한 (스텁) 해석기 기능에 ldns를 사용하는 애플리케이션이 오프패스 중독 공격에 취약해집니다. ldns와 함께 제공되는 드릴 도구에는 이 취약점이 있습니다.
  
심각도: 8.2 | 높음
  
  CVSS 세부 정보, 영향을 받는 제품, 타임라인 등과 같은 자세한 내용을 보려면 링크를 방문하세요.

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-11837 - Ansible-collection-ansible-posix: ansible.posix authorized_key: local privilege escalation via symlink-following chown
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-11837
  
Published : June 10, 2026, 5:16 a.m. | 1 hour, 15 minutes ago
  
Description :A local privilege escalation vulnerability was found in the ansible.posix authorized_key module. The module's keyfile() function uses os.chown() instead of os.lchown() and opens files without O_NOFOLLOW when managing SSH authorized keys. An unprivileged local user can pre-stage symbolic links in their ~/.ssh directory to redirect file ownership changes to arbitrary system paths when an operator runs the authorized_key task as root, leading to local privilege escalation.
  
Severity: 7.3 | HIGH
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...
vulnerability.title_ko: CVE-2026-11837 - Ansible-collection-ansible-posix: ansible.posixauthorized_key: Symlink-following chown을 통한 로컬 권한 에스컬레이션
vulnerability.summary_ko:
CVE ID:CVE-2026-11837
  
게시일 : 2026년 6월 10일 오전 5시 16분 | 1시간, 15분 전
  
설명: ansible.posixauthorized_key 모듈에서 로컬 권한 상승 취약점이 발견되었습니다. 모듈의 keyfile() 함수는 os.lchown() 대신 os.chown()을 사용하고 SSH 인증 키를 관리할 때 O_NOFOLLOW 없이 파일을 엽니다. 권한이 없는 로컬 사용자는 ~/.ssh 디렉터리에 기호 링크를 미리 준비하여 운영자가 루트로authorized_key 작업을 실행할 때 파일 소유권 변경 사항을 임의의 시스템 경로로 리디렉션하여 로컬 권한 상승을 유도할 수 있습니다.
  
심각도: 7.3 | 높음

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-45542 - ESF-IDF: Heap buffer overflow in protocomm Security2 over Bluetooth
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-45542
  
Published : June 10, 2026, 2:16 a.m. | 13 minutes ago
  
Description :ESF-IDF is the Espressif Internet of Things (IOT) Development Framework. In versions 5.2.6, 5.3.5, 5.4.4, 5.5.4, and 6.0, a heap buffer overflow exists in the Security Scheme 2 (SRP6a) session-setup path of the protocomm component. The first-phase handler (handle_session_command0() in components/protocomm/src/security/security2.c) trusts the length of a client-supplied protobuf field for the SRP6a username and copies it into a buffer whose size is derived from a narrower destination type. The resulting truncation-versus-copy asymmetry corrupts the heap when an oversized value is supplied. This issue has been patched in versions 5.2.7, 5.3.6, 5.4.5, 5.5.5, and 6.0.1.
  
Severity: 7.1 | HIGH
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-45541 - ESF-IDF: Remote Null Pointer Dereference in WebSocket Server
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-45541
  
Published : June 10, 2026, 2:16 a.m. | 13 minutes ago
  
Description :ESF-IDF is the Espressif Internet of Things (IOT) Development Framework. In versions 5.2.6, 5.3.5, 5.4.4, 5.5.4, and 6.0, a NULL-pointer dereference exists in the WebSocket subprotocol-negotiation path of the esp_http_server component. While parsing the client-supplied Sec-WebSocket-Protocol request header during the WebSocket handshake, the tokenisation result is dereferenced without a NULL check, so a malformed header value can crash the server before any application-level authentication runs. This issue has been patched in versions 5.2.7, 5.3.6, 5.4.5, 5.5.5, and 6.0.1.
  
Severity: 7.5 | HIGH
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-45329 - ESF-IDF: Out-of-Bounds Read in ESP-TEE Secure Service Wrappers
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-45329
  
Published : June 10, 2026, 2:16 a.m. | 13 minutes ago
  
Description :ESF-IDF is the Espressif Internet of Things (IOT) Development Framework. In versions 5.5.4 and 6.0, several ESP-TEE secure-service wrappers in esp_secure_services.c and esp_secure_services_iram.c validated only some of the caller-supplied pointer arguments, leaving input pointer arguments unchecked. Because the underlying TEE-protected hardware peripherals (e.g., ECC, SHA, SPI) run in RISC-V machine mode (M-mode) with full address-space access, a caller could supply pointers into TEE-exclusive memory as inputs, causing the peripheral to read TEE memory and return results derived from it to the REE. Depending on the wrapper, the result contains raw bytes from TEE memory, a computed function of TEE memory recoverable through repeated calls, or a single bit per call that forms an oracle for incremental disclosure of TEE-resident sensitive data. This issue has been patched in versions 5.5.5 and 6.0.1.
  
Severity: 7.1 | HIGH
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...

vulnerability.summary_ko:
CVE ID:CVE-2026-45329
  
게시일 : 2026년 6월 10일 오전 2시 16분 | 13분 전
  
설명 :ESF-IDF는 Espressif 사물 인터넷(IOT) 개발 프레임워크입니다. 버전 5.5.4 및 6.0에서는 esp_secure_services.c 및 esp_secure_services_iram.c의 여러 ESP-TEE 보안 서비스 래퍼가 호출자가 제공한 포인터 인수 중 일부만 검증하고 입력 포인터 인수는 선택되지 않은 상태로 둡니다. 기본 TEE 보호 하드웨어 주변 장치(예: ECC, SHA, SPI)는 전체 주소 공간 액세스가 가능한 RISC-V 기계 모드(M 모드)에서 실행되므로 호출자는 TEE 전용 메모리에 대한 포인터를 입력으로 제공하여 주변 장치가 TEE 메모리를 읽고 여기에서 파생된 결과를 REE로 반환하도록 할 수 있습니다. 래퍼에 따라 결과에는 TEE 메모리의 원시 바이트, 반복 호출을 통해 복구할 수 있는 TEE 메모리의 계산된 함수 또는 TEE에 상주하는 민감한 데이터의 증분 공개를 위한 오라클을 형성하는 호출당 단일 비트가 포함됩니다. 이 문제는 버전 5.5.5 및 6.0.1에서 패치되었습니다.
  
심각도: 7.1 | 높음
  
  CVSS 세부 정보, 영향을 받는 제품, 타임라인 등과 같은 자세한 내용을 보려면 링크를 방문하세요.

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-45160 - ESF-IDF: Out-of-bounds Read in lwIP DHCP Server Option Parser
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-45160
  
Published : June 10, 2026, 2:16 a.m. | 13 minutes ago
  
Description :ESF-IDF is the Espressif Internet of Things (IOT) Development Framework. In versions 5.2.7, 5.3.5, 5.4.4, 5.5.4, and 6.0.1, an out-of-bounds read flaw exists in the DHCP server option parser (parse_options() in components/lwip/apps/dhcpserver/dhcpserver.c) shipped with ESP-IDF's lwIP component. The parser walks the BOOTP/DHCP options field without validating that each option's length byte and declared payload length stay within the received packet buffer. A crafted DHCP request can cause the parser to read past the end of the options buffer into adjacent heap memory. The issue affects the DHCP server used by ESP-IDF's SoftAP and any configuration where the device runs as a DHCP server on a local network. This issue has been patched in versions 5.2.8, 5.3.6, 5.4.5, 5.5.5, and 6.0.2.
  
Severity: 6.5 | MEDIUM
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-44634 - Stack buffer overflows in SimpleBLE
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-44634
  
Published : June 10, 2026, 1:16 a.m. | 1 hour, 13 minutes ago
  
Description :SimpleBLE is a cross-platform library and bindings for Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE). Prior to version 0.14.0, there are multiple stack-based buffer overflow vulnerabilities in SimpleBLE. There is a stack overflow vulnerability in the dongl backend’s Protocol::simpleble_write function (local, caller-controlled input). A stack overflow vulnerability when processing manufacturer-specific data in BLE advertisements (remote, no pairing or connection required). Lastly, a stack overflow vulnerability when processing service data in BLE advertisements (remote, no pairing or connection required). This issue has been patched in version 0.14.0.
  
Severity: 8.7 | HIGH
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...

CVE ID :CVE-2026-53675
  
Published : June 10, 2026, 12:16 a.m. | 21 minutes ago
  
Description :BuddyPress 14.4.0 contains an insecure direct object reference vulnerability in the friends REST API that allows any authenticated attacker to enumerate another user's complete friend list. vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-53674 - BuddyPress 14.4.0 REGEXP Injection via @Mention Username Resolution
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-53674
  
Published : June 10, 2026, 12:16 a.m. | 21 minutes ago
  
Description :BuddyPress 14.4.0 contains a regular expression injection vulnerability in the activity mention resolver that, when username compatibility mode is enabled, allows attackers to manipulate a REGEXP database clause by crafting mention names containing regex metacharacters. Attackers can submit @mentions whose metacharacters pass through esc_sql unescaped and are inserted into an unprepared REGEXP query against the users table, enabling boolean-based inference of usernames and denial of service through catastrophic backtracking.
  
Severity: 7.1 | HIGH

vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-53673
  
Published : June 10, 2026, 12:16 a.m. | 21 minutes ago
  
Description :BuddyPress 14.4.0 contains an insecure direct object reference vulnerability in the messages REST API that allows authenticated attackers to access arbitrary private message threads by supplying a user_id parameter in the request. vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-46542 - nimiq-keys: Denial of service in Ed25519 multisig delinearization via invalid curve points
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-46542
  
Published : June 10, 2026, 12:16 a.m. | 21 minutes ago
  
Description :Nimiq is a Rust implementation of the Nimiq Proof-of-Stake protocol based on the Albatross consensus algorithm. Prior to version 1.4.0, a denial-of-service vulnerability exists in the Ed25519 multisig delinearization code path. Ed25519PublicKey::delinearize() in keys/src/multisig/mod.rs called .unwrap() on curve point decompression, which panics when a public key is constructed from 32 bytes that do not represent a valid point on the Ed25519 curve. Ed25519PublicKey construction only validates byte length, not curve membership, so invalid keys can reach the delinearization path and crash the hosting process. This issue has been patched in version 1.4.0.
  
Severity: 4.3 | MEDIUM
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...

Keys/src/multisig/mod.rs의 Ed25519PublicKey::delinearize()는 곡선 점 압축 해제 시 .unwrap()을 호출했는데, 공개 키가 Ed25519 곡선의 유효한 점을 나타내지 않는 32바이트로 구성되면 패닉이 발생합니다. Ed25519PublicKey 구성은 곡선 멤버십이 아닌 바이트 길이만 검증하므로 유효하지 않은 키가 비선형화 경로에 도달하여 호스팅 프로세스를 중단시킬 수 있습니다. 이 문제는 버전 1.4.0에서 패치되었습니다.

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-46540 - Nimiq light-blockchain: Light blockchain rebranch issue
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-46540
  
Published : June 10, 2026, 12:16 a.m. | 21 minutes ago
  
Description :Nimiq is a Rust implementation of the Nimiq Proof-of-Stake protocol based on the Albatross consensus algorithm. Prior to version 1.4.0, when LightBlockchain::rebranch() adopts a fork chain whose tip is a macro block (checkpoint or election), it only updates self.head but fails to update self.macro_head, self.election_head, self.current_validators, or store the election header in the chain_store. This is in direct contrast with the full Blockchain::rebranch() at blockchain/src/blockchain/push.rs:504-518, which correctly updates all macro/election state when the new head is a macro block. After a rebranch to a macro block, the stale macro_head causes subsequent macro blocks pushed via push() to be verified against the wrong predecessor via verify_macro_successor(&this.macro_head). If the rebranch target was an election block, the stale current_validators causes every subsequent block to fail verify_validators(), completely stalling the light client's chain progression. This issue has been patched in version 1.4.0.
  
Severity: 6.5 | MEDIUM
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-46539 - nimiq-primitives: BlockInclusionProof interlink issue when hops are empty
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-46539
  
Published : June 10, 2026, 12:16 a.m. | 21 minutes ago
  
Description :Nimiq is a Rust implementation of the Nimiq Proof-of-Stake protocol based on the Albatross consensus algorithm. Prior to version 1.4.0, a logic flaw in BlockInclusionProof::is_block_proven causes the function to return true without performing any cryptographic verification when get_interlink_hops yields an empty hop list. This occurs when the target block is at the election block position immediately preceding the election head's epoch. An attacker providing transaction inclusion proofs can forge a MacroBlock header for that epoch position and have it accepted as "proven" without any hash or signature verification. This issue has been patched in version 1.4.0.
  
Severity: 5.9 | MEDIUM

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-46518 - OpenEMR: Stored XSS in prescription CSS/HTML print view via patient demographics
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-46518
  
Published : June 10, 2026, 12:16 a.m. | 21 minutes ago
  
Description :OpenEMR is a free and open source electronic health records and medical practice management application. Prior to version 8.0.0.1, a stored cross-site scripting vulnerability in the prescription CSS/HTML multi-print feature allows a patient portal user to execute arbitrary JavaScript in a clinician's browser session. Patient demographic fields (name, address) are rendered without output encoding in multiprintcss_header(), and portal patients can write attacker-controlled HTML directly into patient_data by calling the PUT api/patient/:num endpoint, which bypasses the intended audit review workflow. Because the XSS fires in the clinician's authenticated session on the main OpenEMR interface, the attacker can access CSRF tokens, session data, and perform actions as the clinician — crossing the patient-to-clinician trust boundary. This issue has been patched in version 8.0.0.1.
  
Severity: 7.7 | HIGH
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-46491 - SimpleSAMLphp casserver FileSystemTicketStore path traversal allows out-of-ticket-directory read/unserialize and conditional deletion
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-46491
  
Published : June 10, 2026, 12:16 a.m. | 21 minutes ago
  
Description :SimpleSAMLphp-casserver is a CAS 1.0 and 2.0 compliant CAS server in the form of a SimpleSAMLphp module. Prior to version 7.0.3, simplesamlphp-module-casserver builds file paths for the file-based CAS ticket store by directly concatenating the configured ticket directory with an attacker-controlled ticket identifier. Public CAS validation/proxy endpoints pass attacker-controlled ticket / pgt query parameters into this store. In deployments using FileSystemTicketStore, a remote attacker can use path traversal sequences such as ../target.serialized to make the CAS server read and unserialize files outside the ticket directory. In the CAS 1.0 validation flow, the same attacker-selected path is also passed to deleteTicket() immediately after getTicket() returns, which can delete the target file when it is readable by the PHP process, deletable under the PHP process filesystem permissions, and unserializes to a value compatible with the ?array return type. This issue has been patched in version 7.0.3.
  
Severity: 8.6 | HIGH
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...
vulnerability.title_ko: CVE-2026-46491 - SimpleSAMLphp casserver FileSystemTicketStore 경로 탐색을 통해 티켓 디렉터리 외부 읽기/직렬화 취소 및 조건부 삭제가 허용됩니다.

게시일 : 2026년 6월 10일 오전 12시 16분 | 21분 전

FileSystemTicketStore를 사용한 배포에서 원격 공격자는 ../target.serialized와 같은 경로 탐색 시퀀스를 사용하여 CAS 서버가 티켓 디렉터리 외부의 파일을 읽고 직렬화 해제하도록 할 수 있습니다. vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-45782 - Cloud Hypervisor: Use-after-free in virtio-block Async I/O Completion
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-45782
  
Published : June 10, 2026, 12:16 a.m. | 21 minutes ago
  
Description :Cloud Hypervisor is a Virtual Machine Monitor for Cloud workloads. From version 21.0 to before version 51.2, a guest can cause a use-after-free in the cloud-hypervisor process by submitting two virtio-block descriptor chains that reuse the same head_index while asynchronous block I/O is enabled (e.g. io_uring, aio). When the kernel completes the duplicate operation before the original, the completion path frees a bounce buffer that the kernel is still actively reading from or writing to, corrupting the freed memory. This issue has been patched in versions 51.2 and 52.0.

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-44716 - Pipecat: Path Traversal in Pipecat Runner `/files` Endpoint — Arbitrary File Read via `%2F`-Encoded Separator
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-44716
  
Published : June 10, 2026, 12:16 a.m. | 21 minutes ago
  
Description :Pipecat is an open-source Python framework for building real-time voice and multimodal conversational agents. From version 0.0.90 to before version 1.2.0, a path traversal vulnerability exists in Pipecat's development runner (src/pipecat/runner/run.py). When the runner is started with the --folder flag, it exposes a GET /files/{filename:path} download endpoint. The filename path parameter is concatenated directly onto args.folder with no containment check. Starlette normalises literal ../ sequences in URLs, but %2F-encoded slashes bypass this normalisation: the path parameter is URL-decoded after routing, so ..%2F..%2Fetc%2Fpasswd resolves to a path two levels above args.folder. An attacker with network access to the runner can read any file the pipecat process has permission to access — including SSH private keys, credentials, and system files — with a single unauthenticated HTTP request. This issue has been patched in version 1.2.0.
  
Severity: 7.5 | HIGH
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...

Starlette는 URL의 리터럴 ../ 시퀀스를 표준화하지만 %2F로 인코딩된 슬래시는 이 정규화를 우회합니다. 경로 매개변수는 라우팅 후 URL로 디코딩되므로 ..%2F..%2Fetc%2Fpasswd는 args.folder보다 두 수준 높은 경로로 확인됩니다. Runner에 대한 네트워크 액세스 권한이 있는 공격자는 인증되지 않은 단일 HTTP 요청을 통해 SSH 개인 키, 자격 증명 및 시스템 파일을 포함하여 Pipecat 프로세스에 액세스 권한이 있는 모든 파일을 읽을 수 있습니다. 이 문제는 버전 1.2.0에서 패치되었습니다.

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-44505 - Nimiq network-libp2p: Untrusted peer can wedge DHT
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-44505
  
Published : June 10, 2026, 12:16 a.m. | 21 minutes ago
  
Description :Nimiq is a Rust implementation of the Nimiq Proof-of-Stake protocol based on the Albatross consensus algorithm. network-libp2p handles kad get-record query progress in handle_dht_get (network-libp2p/src/swarm.rs). Prior to version 1.4.0, when a peer returns a FoundRecord, the code verifies the record via dht_verifier.verify(&record.record). On verifier error, handle_dht_get logs and returns early without completing the oneshot used by Network::dht_get, and without cleaning up per-query bookkeeping. Later query progress can hit the "DHT inconsistent state" path and also return without cleanup. Because Network::dht_get awaits the oneshot without a timeout, the caller future can hang indefinitely. This issue has been patched in version 1.4.0.
  
Severity: 5.3 | MEDIUM
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...

Network::dht_get은 시간 초과 없이 원샷을 기다리기 때문에 호출자 future가 무기한 정지될 수 있습니다. 이 문제는 버전 1.4.0에서 패치되었습니다.

Description :Spring Data REST is vulnerable to SpEL expression injection through map-typed properties when processing JSON Patch (application/json-patch+json) requests. vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-46433 - lldpd: Heap OOB Read in VLAN Decapsulation memmove
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-46433
  
Published : June 9, 2026, 10:49 p.m. | 29 minutes ago
  
Description :lldpd is an implementation of IEEE 802.1ab (LLDP). Prior to version 1.0.22, lldpd_decode() in src/daemon/lldpd.c strips 802.1Q VLAN tags from received Ethernet frames by calling memmove() to shift the frame payload 4 bytes left. The third argument (byte count) is s - 2 * ETHER_ADDR_LEN but should be s - 2 * ETHER_ADDR_LEN - 4, causing a 4-byte heap buffer over-read past the malloc(h_mtu) allocation when the received frame size equals the interface MTU. This issue has been patched in version 1.0.22.
  
Severity: 0.0 | NA
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...

vulnerability.summary_ko:

게시일 : 2026년 6월 9일 오후 10시 49분 | 29분 전
  
설명 :lldpd는 IEEE 802.1ab(LLDP)를 구현한 것입니다. 버전 1.0.22 이전에는 src/daemon/lldpd.c의 lldpd_decode()가 memmove()를 호출하여 프레임 페이로드를 4바이트 왼쪽으로 이동함으로써 수신된 이더넷 프레임에서 802.1Q VLAN 태그를 제거합니다. 세 번째 인수(바이트 수)는 s - 2 * ETHER_ADDR_LEN이지만 s - 2 * ETHER_ADDR_LEN - 4여야 하며, 수신된 프레임 크기가 인터페이스 MTU와 같을 때 malloc(h_mtu) 할당을 지나서 4바이트 힙 버퍼를 초과 읽게 됩니다. 이 문제는 버전 1.0.22에서 패치되었습니다.
  
심각도: 0.0 | 해당 없음
  
  CVSS 세부 정보, 영향을 받는 제품, 타임라인 등과 같은 자세한 내용을 보려면 링크를 방문하세요.

Published : June 9, 2026, 10:38 p.m. | 39 minutes ago
  
Description :SQLFluff is a modular SQL linter and auto-formatter with support for multiple dialects and templated code. Prior to version 4.1.0, in deployments where untrusted users can provide SQL queries to be linted, an untrusted user can submit a malicious query with deliberate excessive nesting to any application using the parser to trigger a Denial of Service through resource exhaustion. This issue has been patched in version 4.1.0.

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-9752 - GeometryCollection with strict-winding polygon causes server crash during 2dsphere index key generation
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-9752
  
Published : June 9, 2026, 10:27 p.m. | 50 minutes ago
  
Description :An authorized user could trigger a server crash by running a query with a 2dsphere index on a field that stores a GeoJSON GeometryCollection containing a Polygon with a strict-winding CRS.

Strict-winding polygons are intentionally unsupported for indexing, but the guard that rejects them does not inspect members of a GeometryCollection, allowing the unsafe path to be reached which ends with an ensuing null-pointer dereference.
  
Severity: 7.1 | HIGH
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-34417 - OSCAL-GUI Reflected XSS via project parameter in oscal-forms.php
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-34417
  
Published : June 9, 2026, 10:16 p.m. | 14 minutes ago
  
Description :OSCAL-GUI contains a reflected cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary JavaScript in a victim's browser by injecting malicious content through the project request parameter in oscal-forms.php. The parameter value is URL-decoded and assigned to the project_id variable without sanitization in oscal-functions.php, and when the supplied project ID is not found, the unsanitized value is concatenated into an error message via the Messages() function and reflected into the HTML response body without encoding.
  
Severity: 6.1 | MEDIUM
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...

vulnerability.summary:

Description :OpenClinic GA 5.351.19 contains a reflected cross-site scripting vulnerability in the DICOM image upload handler that allows attackers to execute arbitrary JavaScript in a victim's browser by embedding malicious payloads in DICOM file metadata fields. vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-9749 - Using MaxKey() may crash the server
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-9749
  
Published : June 9, 2026, 10:10 p.m. | 20 minutes ago
  
Description :This issue can occur when running an aggregation pipeline that uses the internal $exchange stage configured with key-range partitioning and order-preserving delivery. If a single key range produces enough documents to fill its exchange buffer (that is, many results are routed to the same consumer), the server reaches the code path where a full per-consumer buffer is detected but the internal "high watermark" for that key range is not updated as intended.
  
Severity: 7.1 | HIGH
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-9748 - $_internalConvertBucketIndexStats may crash the mongod server when working on no timeseries input
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-9748
  
Published : June 9, 2026, 10:08 p.m. | 22 minutes ago
  
Description :The $_internalConvertBucketIndexStats stage used PauseExecution as a way to signal "skip this document" when an index stats conversion failed. But PauseExecution is not a general purpose skip mechanism, but rather a TeeBuffer-internal signal used solely by $facet to coordinate its sub-pipelines. When this stage is placed before $facet in a pipeline, TeeBuffer receives the unexpected PauseExecution from upstream and hits a hard invariant assertion, crashing mongod.
  
Severity: 7.1 | HIGH
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...
vulnerability.title_ko: CVE-2026-9748 - 시계열 입력이 없는 경우 $_internalConvertBucketIndexStats가 mongod 서버를 충돌시킬 수 있음

CVE ID:CVE-2026-9748
  
게시일 : 2026년 6월 9일 오후 10시 8분 | 22분 전
  
설명: $_internalConvertBucketIndexStats 단계에서는 인덱스 통계 변환이 실패했을 때 "이 문서 건너뛰기" 신호를 보내는 방법으로 PauseExecution을 사용했습니다. 그러나 PauseExecution은 범용 건너뛰기 메커니즘이 아니라 하위 파이프라인을 조정하기 위해 $facet에서만 사용되는 TeeBuffer 내부 신호입니다. 이 단계가 파이프라인의 $facet 앞에 배치되면 TeeBuffer는 업스트림에서 예상치 못한 PauseExecution을 수신하고 하드 불변 어설션에 도달하여 mongod를 충돌시킵니다.
  
심각도: 7.1 | 높음
  
  CVSS 세부 정보, 영향을 받는 제품, 타임라인 등과 같은 자세한 내용을 보려면 링크를 방문하세요.

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-9743 - Aggregation sub-pipeline null dereference may allow DoS via crafted getMore
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-9743
  
Published : June 9, 2026, 9:59 p.m. | 31 minutes ago
  
Description :In MongoDB Server 8.0, an aggregation stage can leave its _subPipeline field null during processing of certain pipelines. If a getMore is subsequently issued on the same cursor, the server may dereference this null sub-pipeline when reattaching to the operation context, accessing an invalid address and crashing the process. This issue allows an authenticated user who can run aggregation pipelines to cause a denial of service by issuing a specially crafted aggregation followed by getMore on affected versions.
  
Severity: 7.1 | HIGH
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-47106 - Ellucian Banner Self-Service Stored XSS via getFacultyMeetingTimes API
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-47106
  
Published : June 9, 2026, 8:16 p.m. | 13 minutes ago
  
Description :Ellucian Banner Self-Service before the April T2 release (2025-04-23) contains a stored cross-site scripting vulnerability in the course search functionality that allows authenticated Banner ERP users to inject malicious payloads into faculty and course fields by exploiting missing HTML encoding during DOM insertion. Attackers can store malicious JavaScript in fields such as faculty displayName, emailAddress, subjectDescription, or courseTitle through the unauthenticated getFacultyMeetingTimes API endpoint, causing arbitrary script execution.
  
Severity: 5.4 | MEDIUM
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-11824 - SQLite before 3.53.2 Heap Buffer Overflow via FTS5 fts5ChunkIterate
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-11824
  
Published : June 9, 2026, 8:16 p.m. | 14 minutes ago
  
Description :SQLite before 3.53.2 contains a heap-based buffer overflow vulnerability in the FTS5 full-text search extension that allows attackers to cause a crash or execute arbitrary code by supplying a crafted database with malicious continuation page metadata specifying a szLeaf value smaller than 4. Attackers can trigger an integer underflow in fts5ChunkIterate() causing an inflated remaining byte count during FTS5 MATCH query processing, leading to a heap buffer overflow of attacker-controlled data in applications compiled with SQLITE_ENABLE_FTS5.
  
Severity: 8.5 | HIGH
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...
vulnerability.title_ko: CVE-2026-11824 - 3.53.2 이전의 SQLite FTS5 fts5ChunkIterate를 통한 힙 버퍼 오버플로
vulnerability.summary_ko:
CVE ID:CVE-2026-11824
  
게시일 : 2026년 6월 9일 오후 8시 16분 | 14분 전
  
설명: 3.53.2 이전의 SQLite에는 4보다 작은 szLeaf 값을 지정하는 악의적인 연속 페이지 메타데이터가 있는 조작된 데이터베이스를 제공하여 공격자가 충돌을 일으키거나 임의 코드를 실행할 수 있도록 허용하는 FTS5 전체 텍스트 검색 확장의 힙 기반 버퍼 오버플로 취약점이 포함되어 있습니다. 공격자는 fts5ChunkIterate()에서 정수 언더플로를 트리거하여 FTS5 MATCH 쿼리 처리 중에 남은 바이트 수가 부풀려져 다음과 같은 힙 버퍼 오버플로가 발생할 수 있습니다. SQLITE_ENABLE_FTS5로 컴파일된 애플리케이션의 공격자가 제어하는 데이터.
  
심각도: 8.5 | 높음

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-11822 - SQLite before 3.53.2 Memory Corruption in FTS5 Extension
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-11822
  
Published : June 9, 2026, 8:16 p.m. | 14 minutes ago
  
Description :SQLite before 3.53.2 contains memory corruption vulnerabilities in the FTS5 full-text search extension that allow attackers to cause process crashes, memory exhaustion, or arbitrary code execution by supplying a crafted database with malformed FTS5 page data. Attackers can trigger an out-of-bounds read in fts5LeafSeek() via an attacker-controlled loop bound and a heap buffer overflow write in fts5ChunkIterate() through a crafted continuation page causing an integer underflow, exploitable when an FTS5 MATCH query is executed against the malicious database.
  
Severity: 8.5 | HIGH
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...

vulnerability.summary_ko:

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-50636 - LimeSurvey RemoteControl invite_participants/remind_participants SQL Injection
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-50636
  
Published : June 9, 2026, 6:17 p.m. | 21 minutes ago
  
Description :The RemoteControl API methods invite_participants and remind_participants pass a caller-supplied token-ID array into TokenDynamic::findUninvited(), which concatenates the values directly into a tid IN ('...') SQL clause without parameterization or input validation. A remote, authenticated attacker holding the tokens/update permission on a survey can inject a crafted array element to perform SQL injection. Because LimeSurvey configures its PDO connection with emulated prepared statements (emulatePrepare = true) and does not disable MySQL multi-statements, the injection supports stacked queries: the attacker can append arbitrary additional statements (INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE/DROP/CREATE) after the original SELECT. This permits both arbitrary read of any data in the database, such as administrator bcrypt password hashes (lime_users), survey response PII, session records, and global settings, all recoverable via a SLEEP() time-based blind oracle, and arbitrary write/destruction of that data, including directly overwriting the administrator password hash for immediate account takeover or dropping/truncating tables. Reads and writes extend to any schema the application's database user can access. The RemoteControl interface (RPCInterface = json/xml) must be enabled, which is not the default.
  
Severity: 8.8 | HIGH
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...
vulnerability.title_ko: CVE-2026-50636 - LimeSurvey RemoteControl Invitation_participants/remind_participants SQL 주입
vulnerability.summary_ko:
CVE ID:CVE-2026-50636
  
게시일 : 2026년 6월 9일 오후 6시 17분 | 21분 전
  
설명:RemoteControl API 메서드인 Invitation_participants 및 Remind_participants는 호출자 제공 토큰 ID 배열을 TokenDynamic::findUninvited()에 전달합니다. 이 배열은 매개변수화나 입력 유효성 검사 없이 값을 tid IN('...') SQL 절에 직접 연결합니다. 설문 조사에 대한 토큰/업데이트 권한을 보유한 인증된 원격 공격자는 조작된 배열 요소를 주입하여 SQL 주입을 수행할 수 있습니다. LimeSurvey는 에뮬레이트된 준비된 문(emulatePrepare = true)으로 PDO 연결을 구성하고 MySQL 다중 문을 비활성화하지 않기 때문에 주입은 스택 쿼리를 지원합니다. 공격자는 원래 SELECT 뒤에 임의의 추가 문(INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE/DROP/CREATE)을 추가할 수 있습니다. 이를 통해 관리자 bcrypt 비밀번호 해시(lime_users), 설문 조사 응답 PII, 세션 기록 및 전역 설정과 같은 데이터베이스의 모든 데이터에 대한 임의 읽기가 모두 허용되며 모두 SLEEP() 시간 기반 블라인드 오라클을 통해 복구 가능하며, 즉각적인 계정 탈취 또는 테이블 삭제/자르기를 위해 관리자 비밀번호 해시를 직접 덮어쓰는 것을 포함하여 해당 데이터의 임의 쓰기/파괴가 허용됩니다. 읽기 및 쓰기는 애플리케이션의 데이터베이스 사용자가 액세스할 수 있는 모든 스키마로 확장됩니다. RemoteControl 인터페이스(RPCInterface = json/xml)를 활성화해야 하며 이는 기본값이 아닙니다.
  
심각도: 8.8 | 높음
  
  CVSS 세부 정보, 영향을 받는 제품, 타임라인 등과 같은 자세한 내용을 보려면 링크를 방문하세요.
vulnerability.summary_3lines:
1. CVE-2026-50636
2. 26.06.10 오전3:17
3. The RemoteControl API methods invite_participants

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-50635 - LimeSurvey Password Reset Host Header Injection Discloses Reset Token
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-50635
  
Published : June 9, 2026, 6:17 p.m. | 21 minutes ago
  
Description :LimeSurvey constructs account password-reset links from the client-supplied HTTP Host header without validating it. The optional allowedHosts allowlist that would constrain this is undefined in the default (and documented) configuration, so LSHttpRequest::checkIsAllowedHost() results in no operation. A remote, unauthenticated attacker who submits a forgotten-password request for a known account (requiring only the target's username and email) with a spoofed Host header causes LimeSurvey to email that account a reset link whose hostname is attacker-controlled while embedding the genuine validation_key. When the recipient or an automated inbound mail-security link scanner dereferences the link, the valid reset token is disclosed to the attacker, who replays it against the legitimate host's newPassword endpoint to set a new password and take over the account.
  
Severity: 8.8 | HIGH
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...
vulnerability.title_ko: CVE-2026-50635 - LimeSurvey 비밀번호 재설정 호스트 헤더 삽입으로 재설정 토큰 공개
vulnerability.summary_ko:
CVE ID:CVE-2026-50635
  
게시일 : 2026년 6월 9일 오후 6시 17분 | 21분 전
  
설명:LimeSurvey는 클라이언트가 제공한 HTTP 호스트 헤더에서 계정 비밀번호 재설정 링크를 검증하지 않고 구성합니다. 이를 제한하는 선택적 allowedHosts 허용 목록은 기본(및 문서화된) 구성에서 정의되지 않으므로 LSHttpRequest::checkIsAllowedHost()는 작업을 수행하지 않습니다. 스푸핑된 호스트 헤더와 함께 알려진 계정(대상의 사용자 이름과 이메일만 필요함)에 대해 잊어버린 비밀번호 요청을 제출하는 인증되지 않은 원격 공격자는 LimeSurvey가 실제 유효성 검사_키를 내장하면서 호스트 이름이 공격자가 제어하는 ​​재설정 링크를 해당 계정에 이메일로 보내게 합니다. 수신자 또는 자동화된 인바운드 메일 보안 링크 스캐너가 링크를 역참조하면 유효한 재설정 토큰이 공격자에게 공개되고, 공격자는 합법적인 호스트의 newPassword 엔드포인트에 대해 이를 재생하여 새 비밀번호를 설정하고 계정을 탈취합니다.
  
심각도: 8.8 | 높음
  
  CVSS 세부 정보, 영향을 받는 제품, 타임라인 등과 같은 자세한 내용을 보려면 링크를 방문하세요.

vulnerability.title: Microsoft June 2026 Patch Tuesday, (Tue, Jun 9th)
vulnerability.summary: Microsoft today released patches for 204 vulnerabilities. 38 of these vulnerabilities are considered critical, and three have been disclosed before today. Six of the vulnerabilities affect Microsoft cloud solutions and do not require any user action. In addition, Microsoft incorporated 360 different vulnerabilities affecting Chromium into its Edge browser.

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-9076 - Out-of-Bounds Read in CMS Password-Based Decryption
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-9076
  
Published : June 9, 2026, 5:17 p.m. | 41 minutes ago
  
Description :Issue summary: When CMS password-based decryption (RFC 3211 / PWRI key unwrap)
processes attacker-supplied CMS data, an attacker-chosen stream-mode KEK
cipher can trigger a heap out-of-bounds read in kek_unwrap_key().

Impact summary: A heap buffer over-read may trigger a crash which leads to
Denial of Service for an application if the input buffer ends at a memory
page boundary and the following page is unmapped. There is no information
disclosure as the over-read bytes are not revealed to the attacker.

The key unwrapping function performs a check-byte test as specified in the
RFC that reads 7 bytes from a heap allocation that is based on the wrapped
key length from the message. There is a minimum length check based on the
block length of the wrapping cipher. However the cipher is selected from
an OID carried in the attacker's PWRI keyEncryptionAlgorithm with no
requirement that the cipher be a block cipher. When an attacker selects
a stream-mode cipher the guard will be ineffective and the allocated buffer
containing the unwrapped key can be too small to fit the check-bytes
specified in the RFC and a buffer over-read can happen.

Applications calling CMS_decrypt() or CMS_decrypt_set1_password()
(equivalently openssl cms -decrypt -pwri_password ...) on untrusted CMS
data are vulnerable to this issue. No password knowledge is required: the
over-read happens during the unwrap attempt before any authentication
succeeds.

The over-read is limited to a few bytes and is not written to output, so
there is no information disclosure. Triggering a crash requires the
allocation to border unmapped memory, which is unlikely with the normal
allocator.

The FIPS modules are not affected by this issue.
  
Severity: 0.0 | NA
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...
vulnerability.title_ko: CVE-2026-9076 - CMS 비밀번호 기반 암호 해독에서 범위를 벗어난 읽기
vulnerability.summary_ko:
CVE ID:CVE-2026-9076
  
게시일 : 2026년 6월 9일 오후 5시 17분 | 41분 전
  
설명:문제 요약: CMS 비밀번호 기반 복호화(RFC 3211 / PWRI 키 언래핑) 시
공격자가 선택한 스트림 모드 KEK인 공격자가 제공한 CMS 데이터를 처리합니다.
암호는 kek_unwrap_key()에서 범위를 벗어난 힙 읽기를 트리거할 수 있습니다.

영향 요약: 힙 버퍼를 과도하게 읽으면 충돌이 발생하여 다음이 발생할 수 있습니다.
입력 버퍼가 메모리에서 끝나는 경우 애플리케이션에 대한 서비스 거부
페이지 경계가 표시되고 다음 페이지가 매핑 해제됩니다. 정보가 없습니다
과도하게 읽은 바이트는 공격자에게 공개되지 않습니다.

키 언래핑 기능은 다음에 지정된 대로 검사 바이트 테스트를 수행합니다.
래핑된 힙 할당에서 7바이트를 읽는 RFC
메시지의 키 길이입니다. 최소 길이 확인은 다음을 기준으로 합니다.
래핑 암호의 블록 길이입니다. 그러나 암호는 다음에서 선택됩니다.
공격자의 PWRI keyEncryptionAlgorithm에 포함된 OID
암호는 블록 암호여야 합니다. 공격자가 선택할 때
스트림 모드 암호는 가드가 무효화되고 할당된 버퍼가
래핑되지 않은 키를 포함하는 키가 너무 작아서 검사 바이트에 맞지 않을 수 있습니다.
RFC에 지정되어 있으며 버퍼 초과 읽기가 발생할 수 있습니다.

CMS_decrypt() 또는 CMS_decrypt_set1_password()를 호출하는 애플리케이션
(동일하게 openssl cms -decrypt -pwri_password ...) 신뢰할 수 없는 CMS의 경우
데이터는 이 문제에 취약합니다. 비밀번호 지식이 필요하지 않습니다.
인증 전에 랩핑 해제를 시도하는 동안 초과 읽기가 발생합니다.
성공합니다.

초과 읽기는 몇 바이트로 제한되며 출력에 기록되지 않으므로
정보 공개가 없습니다. 충돌을 유발하려면 다음이 필요합니다.
경계가 매핑되지 않은 메모리에 할당됩니다. 이는 일반 메모리에서는 발생하지 않습니다.
할당자.

FIPS 모듈은 이 문제의 영향을 받지 않습니다.
  
심각도: 0.0 | 해당 없음
  
  CVSS 세부 정보, 영향을 받는 제품, 타임라인 등과 같은 자세한 내용을 보려면 링크를 방문하세요.

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-7383 - Possible Heap Buffer Overflow in ASN.1 Multibyte String Conversion
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-7383
  
Published : June 9, 2026, 5:17 p.m. | 41 minutes ago
  
Description :Issue summary: A signed integer overflow when sizing the destination
buffer for Unicode output in ASN1_mbstring_ncopy() can lead to a heap
buffer overflow.

Impact summary: A heap buffer overflow may lead to a crash or possibly
attacker controlled code execution or other undefined behaviour.

In ASN1_mbstring_copy() and ASN1_mbstring_ncopy() the destination
size for Unicode output is computed in a signed int: by left shift
of the input character count for BMPSTRING (UTF-16) and
UNIVERSALSTRING (UTF-32), and by summing per-character byte counts
for UTF8STRING. The calculation overflows when the input reaches
around 2^30 characters. In the worst case (UNIVERSALSTRING at 2^30
characters) the size wraps to zero, OPENSSL_malloc(1) is called, and
the subsequent character copy writes several gigabytes past the
one-byte allocation.

X.509 certificate processing routes through ASN1_STRING_set_by_NID(),
whose DIRSTRING_TYPE mask excludes UNIVERSALSTRING and whose per-NID
size limits cap the input length; no network protocol or
certificate-handling path in OpenSSL exercises the overflow.
Triggering the bug requires an application that calls
ASN1_mbstring_copy() or ASN1_mbstring_ncopy() directly, or registers
a custom string type via ASN1_STRING_TABLE_add(), with
attacker-controlled input on the order of half a gigabyte or more.
For these reasons this issue was assigned Low severity.

The FIPS modules in 4.0, 3.6, 3.5, 3.4 and 3.0 are not affected by
this issue, as the affected code is outside the OpenSSL FIPS module
boundary.
  
Severity: 8.1 | HIGH
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...
vulnerability.title_ko: CVE-2026-7383 - ASN.1 멀티바이트 문자열 변환에서 가능한 힙 버퍼 오버플로
vulnerability.summary_ko:
CVE ID:CVE-2026-7383
  
게시일 : 2026년 6월 9일 오후 5시 17분 | 41분 전
  
설명:문제 요약: 대상 크기를 조정할 때 부호 있는 정수 오버플로가 발생합니다.
ASN1_mbstring_ncopy()의 유니코드 출력용 버퍼로 인해 힙이 발생할 수 있습니다.
버퍼 오버플로.

영향 요약: 힙 버퍼 오버플로로 인해 충돌이 발생하거나 발생할 수 있습니다.
공격자가 코드 실행을 제어하거나 기타 정의되지 않은 동작을 제어합니다.

ASN1_mbstring_copy() 및 ASN1_mbstring_ncopy()에서 대상
유니코드 출력의 크기는 왼쪽 시프트를 통해 부호 있는 int로 계산됩니다.
BMPSTRING(UTF-16)에 대한 입력 문자 수 및
UNIVERSALSTRING(UTF-32) 및 문자당 바이트 수를 합산하여
UTF8STRING용. 입력이 도달하면 계산이 오버플로됩니다.
약 2^30자 정도입니다. 최악의 경우(2^30의 UNIVERSALSTRING
문자) 크기가 0으로 바뀌고 OPENSSL_malloc(1)이 호출됩니다.
후속 문자 복사본은 이전 문자 복사본보다 몇 기가바이트를 기록합니다.
1바이트 할당.

ASN1_STRING_set_by_NID()를 통한 X.509 인증서 처리 경로,
DIRSTRING_TYPE 마스크는 UNIVERSALSTRING을 제외하고 NID당
크기 제한은 입력 길이를 제한합니다. 네트워크 프로토콜이 없거나
OpenSSL의 인증서 처리 경로는 오버플로를 실행합니다.
버그를 유발하려면 다음을 호출하는 애플리케이션이 필요합니다.
ASN1_mbstring_copy() 또는 ASN1_mbstring_ncopy() 직접 또는 등록
ASN1_STRING_TABLE_add()를 통한 사용자 정의 문자열 유형
공격자가 제어하는 입력은 0.5GB 이상입니다.
이러한 이유로 이 문제는 심각도 낮음으로 지정되었습니다.

4.0, 3.6, 3.5, 3.4 및 3.0의 FIPS 모듈은 다음의 영향을 받지 않습니다.
이 문제는 영향을 받는 코드가 OpenSSL FIPS 모듈 외부에 있기 때문에 발생합니다.
경계.
  
심각도: 8.1 | 높음
  
  CVSS 세부 정보, 영향을 받는 제품, 타임라인 등과 같은 자세한 내용을 보려면 링크를 방문하세요.

Description :Hermes WebUI before version 0.51.311 contains a remote code execution vulnerability that allows authenticated attackers to execute arbitrary commands by placing malicious executable Git configuration in a workspace repository's .git/config file. Attackers can exploit Git subprocess invocations in api/workspace_git.py through vectors such as core.fsmonitor during git status, protocol.ext.allow with ext:: remotes during git fetch, credential.helper, core.askPass, core.gitProxy, or inherited environment variables including GIT_SSH_COMMAND to achieve arbitrary command execution on the host running the application.

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-49958 - Hermes WebUI < 0.51.303 TOCTOU Race Condition via git_discard
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-49958
  
Published : June 9, 2026, 5:17 p.m. | 41 minutes ago
  
Description :Hermes WebUI before version 0.51.303 contains a time-of-check time-of-use (TOCTOU) race condition vulnerability in the git_discard function within api/workspace_git.py that allows attackers to delete files outside the configured workspace boundary by replacing a validated path component with a symlink after validation but before deletion. Attackers can substitute a workspace-controlled path component with a symlink pointing to an external directory between the safe_resolve_ws() validation step and the subsequent Path.unlink() or shutil.rmtree() deletion call, causing the delete operation to follow the symlink and remove arbitrary files outside the workspace.

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-49842 - FreeSWITCH: Pre-authentication bandwidth amplification via `mod_verto` speed-test frames
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-49842
  
Published : June 9, 2026, 5:17 p.m. | 41 minutes ago
  
Description :FreeSWITCH is a Software Defined Telecom Stack enabling the digital transformation from proprietary telecom switches to a software implementation that runs on any commodity hardware. Prior to version 1.11.1, mod_verto's WebSocket frame loop intercepts a #-prefixed speed-test protocol (#SPU / #SPB / #SPE) before any authentication check. The declared payload size in #SPU was parsed with atoi() and only rejected non-positive values, so an unauthenticated peer could request up to INT_MAX bytes. The server then wrote roughly size * 10 bytes back during the download phase, on the order of 20 GB per request, yielding strong outbound bandwidth amplification from a short request. This issue has been patched in version 1.11.1.
  
Severity: 7.5 | HIGH
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...
vulnerability.title_ko: CVE-2026-49842 - FreeSWITCH: 'mod_verto' 속도 테스트 프레임을 통한 사전 인증 대역폭 증폭
vulnerability.summary_ko:
CVE ID:CVE-2026-49842
  
게시일 : 2026년 6월 9일 오후 5시 17분 | 41분 전
  
설명:FreeSWITCH는 독점 통신 스위치에서 모든 상용 하드웨어에서 실행되는 소프트웨어 구현으로 디지털 전환을 가능하게 하는 소프트웨어 정의 통신 스택입니다. 버전 1.11.1 이전에는 mod_verto의 WebSocket 프레임 루프가 인증 확인 전에 # 접두사가 붙은 속도 테스트 프로토콜(#SPU / #SPB / #SPE)을 가로챕니다. #SPU에 선언된 페이로드 크기는 atoi()로 구문 분석되었으며 양수가 아닌 값만 거부되었으므로 인증되지 않은 피어는 최대 INT_MAX 바이트를 요청할 수 있습니다. 그런 다음 서버는 다운로드 단계에서 대략 10바이트 크기(요청당 20GB 정도)를 썼고 짧은 요청에서 강력한 아웃바운드 대역폭 증폭을 생성했습니다. 이 문제는 버전 1.11.1에서 패치되었습니다.

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-49841 - FreeSWITCH: Pre-authentication heap buffer overflow in `mod_verto` HTTP POST body read
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-49841
  
Published : June 9, 2026, 5:17 p.m. | 41 minutes ago
  
Description :FreeSWITCH is a Software Defined Telecom Stack enabling the digital transformation from proprietary telecom switches to a software implementation that runs on any commodity hardware. Prior to version 1.11.1, the mod_verto HTTP request handler allocates a fixed 2 MiB buffer for a POST application/x-www-form-urlencoded body but accepts Content-Length up to just under 10 MiB. The body-read loop is bounded by Content-Length rather than the buffer size, producing an attacker-controlled heap overflow of up to ~8 MiB -- before the HTTP basic-auth check runs. This issue has been patched in version 1.11.1.
  
Severity: 9.8 | CRITICAL
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-49840 - FreeSWITCH: Pre-authentication heap buffer overflow in libesl `Content-Length` parsing
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-49840
  
Published : June 9, 2026, 5:17 p.m. | 41 minutes ago
  
Description :FreeSWITCH is a Software Defined Telecom Stack enabling the digital transformation from proprietary telecom switches to a software implementation that runs on any commodity hardware. Prior to version 1.11.1, esl_recv_event() parses Content-Length with atol() and passes the result straight to malloc(len + 1) with no sign or magnitude check. A malicious or man-in-the-middle ESL peer can send a frame with a negative Content-Length to corrupt the heap of, or crash, any process linked against libesl, before the client has authenticated to that peer. This issue has been patched in version 1.11.1.
  
Severity: 9.1 | CRITICAL
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-49848 - FreeSWITCH: Pre-authentication `userVariables` injection in `mod_verto`
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-49848
  
Published : June 9, 2026, 4:05 p.m. | 32 minutes ago
  
Description :FreeSWITCH is a Software Defined Telecom Stack enabling the digital transformation from proprietary telecom switches to a software implementation that runs on any commodity hardware. Prior to version 1.11.1, mod_verto's check_auth userauth branch wrote request-supplied userVariables into the connection state before comparing the supplied password. The writes are append-only and the connection is not closed on a failed compare, so values declared on bad-password attempts persisted on the same WebSocket and carried into a subsequent successful login on that connection. This issue has been patched in version 1.11.1.

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-49843 - FreeSWITCH: Pre-authentication session eviction via attacker-chosen `sessid` in `mod_verto`
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-49843
  
Published : June 9, 2026, 4:04 p.m. | 33 minutes ago
  
Description :FreeSWITCH is a Software Defined Telecom Stack enabling the digital transformation from proprietary telecom switches to a software implementation that runs on any commodity hardware. Prior to version 1.11.1, mod_verto's JSON-RPC handler bound the connection to the client-supplied sessid on the first frame, before the authentication gate. Binding inserts the connection into the global session hash and, on a key collision, drops the prior occupant of that slot — sending it a verto.punt, detaching its calls, and closing its socket. An unauthenticated network attacker who knows a target session UUID could therefore evict the legitimate client. This issue has been patched in version 1.11.1.
  
Severity: 0.0 | NA
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-45447 - Heap Use-After-Free in the PKCS7_verify() Function
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-45447
  
Published : June 9, 2026, 4:03 p.m. | 34 minutes ago
  
Description :Issue summary: A specially crafted PKCS#7 or S/MIME signed message could
trigger a use-after-free during PKCS#7 signature verification.

Impact summary: A use-after-free may result in process crashes, heap
corruption, or potentially remote code execution.

When processing a PKCS#7 or S/MIME signed message, if the SignedData
digestAlgorithms field is present as an empty ASN.1 SET, OpenSSL may
incorrectly free a caller-owned BIO during PKCS7_verify(). A subsequent
use of the BIO by the calling application results in a use-after-free
condition.

In the common case this occurs when the application later calls
BIO_free() on the BIO originally passed to PKCS7_verify(). Depending
on allocator behavior and application-specific BIO usage patterns, this
may result in a crash or other memory corruption. In some application
contexts this may potentially be exploitable for remote code execution.

Applications that process PKCS#7 or S/MIME signed messages using OpenSSL
PKCS#7 APIs may be affected. Applications using the CMS APIs for this
processing are not affected.

The FIPS modules in 4.0, 3.6, 3.5, 3.4, and 3.0 are not affected by this
issue, as the affected code is outside the OpenSSL FIPS module boundary.
  
Severity: 0.0 | NA
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...
vulnerability.title_ko: CVE-2026-45447 - PKCS7_verify() 함수의 힙 Use-After-Free
vulnerability.summary_ko:
CVE ID:CVE-2026-45447
  
게시일 : 2026년 6월 9일 오후 4시 03분 | 34분 전
  
설명:문제 요약: 특별히 제작된 PKCS#7 또는 S/MIME 서명된 메시지는 다음과 같은 문제가 발생할 수 있습니다.
PKCS#7 서명 확인 중에 use-after-free를 트리거합니다.

영향 요약: use-after-free로 인해 프로세스 충돌, 힙이 발생할 수 있음
손상 또는 잠재적으로 원격 코드 실행이 발생할 수 있습니다.

PKCS#7 또는 S/MIME 서명된 메시지를 처리할 때 SignedData
DigestAlgorithms 필드는 빈 ASN.1 SET로 존재하며 OpenSSL은
PKCS7_verify() 중에 호출자가 소유한 BIO를 잘못 해제했습니다. 후속
호출 애플리케이션에서 BIO를 사용하면 use-after-free가 발생합니다.
조건.

일반적인 경우 이는 애플리케이션이 나중에 호출할 때 발생합니다.
BIO의 BIO_free()는 원래 PKCS7_verify()에 전달되었습니다. 따라
할당자 동작 및 애플리케이션별 BIO 사용 패턴에 대해
충돌이나 기타 메모리 손상이 발생할 수 있습니다. 일부 응용 프로그램에서는
컨텍스트에 따라 이는 원격 코드 실행에 잠재적으로 악용될 수 있습니다.

OpenSSL을 사용하여 PKCS#7 또는 S/MIME 서명 메시지를 처리하는 애플리케이션
PKCS#7 API가 영향을 받을 수 있습니다. 이를 위해 CMS API를 사용하는 애플리케이션
처리에는 영향을 미치지 않습니다.

4.0, 3.6, 3.5, 3.4 및 3.0의 FIPS 모듈은 이 영향을 받지 않습니다.
문제는 영향을 받는 코드가 OpenSSL FIPS 모듈 경계 외부에 있기 때문입니다.
  
심각도: 0.0 | 해당 없음
  
  CVSS 세부 정보, 영향을 받는 제품, 타임라인 등과 같은 자세한 내용을 보려면 링크를 방문하세요.

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-45446 - Incorrect Tag Processing for Empty Messages in AES-GCM-SIV and AES-SIV modes
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-45446
  
Published : June 9, 2026, 4:03 p.m. | 34 minutes ago
  
Description :Issue summary: The implementations of AES-SIV (RFC 5297) and AES-GCM-SIV
(RFC 8452) mishandle the authentication of AAD (Additional Authenticated
Data) with an empty ciphertext allowing a forgery of such messages.

Impact summary: An attacker can forge empty messages with arbitrary AAD
to the victim's application using these ciphers.

AES-SIV (RFC 5297) and AES-GCM-SIV (RFC 8452) are nonce-misuse-resistant AEAD
modes: they accept a key, nonce, optional AAD (bytes that are authenticated
but not encrypted), and plaintext, and produces ciphertext plus a 16-byte
tag. On decrypt, `EVP_DecryptFinal_ex()` is documented to return success only
if the tag is verified succesfully.

In OpenSSL's provider implementation of these ciphers, the expected tag is
computed only when decryption function is invoked with non-empty data.
If the caller supplies AAD and then calls `EVP_DecryptFinal_ex()` without
invocation of the ciphertext update, which can happen when the received
ciphertext length is zero, the tag is never recalculated and still holds its
all-zeros value.

When AES-GCM-SIV is used, an attacker who sends arbitrary AAD, empty
ciphertext, and all-zeros tag passes authentication under any key they do not
know, single-shot. When AES-SIV is used, for mounting the attack it's
necessary for the application to reuse the decryption context without
resetting the key.

AES-SIV is implemented since OpenSSL 3.0. AES-GCM-SIV is implemented since
OpenSSL 3.2.

No protocols implemented in OpenSSL itself (TLS/CMS/PKCS7/HPKE/QUIC) support
either AES-GCM-SIV or AES-SIV. To mount an attack, the applications must
implement their own protocol and use the EVP interface. Also they must skip the
ciphertext update when a message with an empty ciphertext arrives.

The FIPS modules in 4.0, 3.6, 3.5, 3.4, and 3.0 are not affected by this
issue, as these algorithms are not FIPS approved and the affected code is
outside the OpenSSL FIPS module boundary.
  
Severity: 0.0 | NA

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-45445 - AES-OCB IV Ignored on EVP_Cipher() Path
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-45445
  
Published : June 9, 2026, 4:03 p.m. | 34 minutes ago
  
Description :Issue summary: When an application drives an AES-OCB context through the
public EVP_Cipher() one-shot interface, the application-supplied
initialisation vector (IV) is silently discarded.

Impact summary: Every message encrypted under the same key uses the
same effective nonce regardless of the IV supplied by the caller,
resulting in (key, nonce) reuse and loss of confidentiality.  If the
same code path is used to compute the authentication tag, the tag
depends only on the (key, IV) pair and not on the plaintext or
ciphertext, allowing universal forgery of arbitrary ciphertext from a
single captured message.

OpenSSL provides two ways to drive a cipher: the documented streaming
interface (EVP_CipherUpdate / EVP_CipherFinal_ex) and a lower-level
one-shot, EVP_Cipher(), whose documentation explicitly recommends
against use by applications in favour of EVP_CipherUpdate() and
EVP_CipherFinal_ex().  The OCB provider's streaming handler flushes
the application-supplied IV into the OCB context before processing
data; the one-shot handler did not.  Every call to EVP_Cipher() on an
AES-OCB context therefore ran with the all-zero key-derived offset
state left by cipher initialisation, regardless of the caller's IV.

If EVP_EncryptFinal_ex() is subsequently used to obtain the
authentication tag, the deferred IV setup runs at that point and
clears the running checksum that should have been accumulated over the
plaintext.  The resulting tag is a function of (key, IV) only and
verifies against any ciphertext produced under the same (key, IV)
pair.

The OpenSSL SSL/TLS implementation is not affected: AES-OCB is not a
TLS cipher suite, and libssl does not call EVP_Cipher() in any case.
Applications that drive AES-OCB through the documented streaming AEAD
API (EVP_CipherUpdate / EVP_CipherFinal_ex) are not affected.  Only
applications that combine the AES-OCB cipher with the EVP_Cipher()
one-shot API are vulnerable.

The FIPS modules in 4.0, 3.6, 3.5, 3.4 and 3.0 are not affected by
this issue, as AES-OCB is outside the OpenSSL FIPS module boundary.
  
Severity: 0.0 | NA
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...
vulnerability.title_ko: CVE-2026-45445 - EVP_Cipher() 경로에서 AES-OCB IV가 무시됨
vulnerability.summary_ko:
CVE ID:CVE-2026-45445
  
게시일 : 2026년 6월 9일 오후 4시 03분 | 34분 전
  
설명:문제 요약: 애플리케이션이 다음을 통해 AES-OCB 컨텍스트를 구동할 때
공개 EVP_Cipher() 원샷 인터페이스, 애플리케이션 제공
초기화 벡터(IV)는 자동으로 삭제됩니다.

영향 요약: 동일한 키로 암호화된 모든 메시지는
호출자가 제공한 IV에 관계없이 동일한 유효 nonce
(키, nonce) 재사용 및 기밀성 손실이 발생합니다.  만약
인증 태그를 계산하는 데 동일한 코드 경로가 사용됩니다.
(키, IV) 쌍에만 의존하고 일반 텍스트나 키에는 의존하지 않습니다.
암호문은 임의의 암호문을 보편적으로 위조할 수 있게 해줍니다.
단일 캡처된 메시지.

OpenSSL은 암호화를 구동하는 두 가지 방법, 즉 문서화된 스트리밍을 제공합니다.
인터페이스(EVP_CipherUpdate / EVP_CipherFinal_ex) 및 하위 수준
문서에서 명시적으로 권장하는 일회성 EVP_Cipher()
EVP_CipherUpdate()를 선호하는 애플리케이션의 사용에 반대하고
EVP_CipherFinal_ex().  OCB 공급자의 스트리밍 핸들러가 플러시됩니다.
처리하기 전에 애플리케이션에서 제공한 IV를 OCB 컨텍스트에 넣습니다.
데이터; 원샷 핸들러는 그렇지 않았습니다.  EVP_Cipher()에 대한 모든 호출은
따라서 AES-OCB 컨텍스트는 모두 0인 키 파생 오프셋으로 실행되었습니다.
호출자의 IV에 관계없이 암호 초기화로 인해 남겨진 상태입니다.

이후에 EVP_EncryptFinal_ex()를 사용하여
인증 태그가 있으면 지연된 IV 설정이 해당 시점에서 실행되고
누적되어야 하는 실행 중인 체크섬을 지웁니다.
평문.  결과 태그는 (키, IV)만의 기능이며
동일한(키, IV) 하에 생성된 모든 암호문에 대해 확인합니다.
쌍.

OpenSSL SSL/TLS 구현은 영향을 받지 않습니다. AES-OCB는
TLS 암호화 제품군 및 libssl은 어떠한 경우에도 EVP_Cipher()를 호출하지 않습니다.
문서화된 스트리밍 AEAD를 통해 AES-OCB를 구동하는 애플리케이션
API(EVP_CipherUpdate / EVP_CipherFinal_ex)는 영향을 받지 않습니다.  만
AES-OCB 암호와 EVP_Cipher()를 결합하는 애플리케이션
원샷 API는 취약합니다.

4.0, 3.6, 3.5, 3.4 및 3.0의 FIPS 모듈은 다음의 영향을 받지 않습니다.
이 문제는 AES-OCB가 OpenSSL FIPS 모듈 경계 외부에 있기 때문입니다.
  
심각도: 0.0 | 해당 없음

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-42771 - Possible Out of Bounds Read in X509_VERIFY_PARAM_set1_email()
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-42771
  
Published : June 9, 2026, 4:03 p.m. | 34 minutes ago
  
Description :Issue summary: When the X509_VERIFY_PARAM_set1_email is called by an
application to validate a crafted e-mail address, such as during S/MIME
message validation, an out of bounds read can happen.

Impact summary: This out of bounds read will not directly exfiltrate
the data read to the attacker so the most likely result is a crash and
a Denial of Service.

An internal helper function called from X509_VERIFY_PARAM_[set|add]_email()
used a wrong length when validating the local part of an email address.
This could cause the 64 octet limit on the local part of an email address
to be not enforced, or cause an out of bound read and potentially a crash.

The bug is reachable via S-MIME validation with a crafted From: address
supplied in an email message that can potentially cause a crash.

No FIPS modules are affected by this issue as the affected code is outside
the OpenSSL FIPS module boundary.
  
Severity: 0.0 | NA
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-42770 - FFC-DH Peer Validation Uses Attacker-Supplied q
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-42770
  
Published : June 9, 2026, 4:03 p.m. | 34 minutes ago
  
Description :Issue summary: When EVP_PKEY_derive_set_peer() is called with a DHX (X9.42)
peer key, the peer key is not properly checked for the subgroup membership.

Impact summary: A malicious peer which presents an X9.42 key carrying the
victim's p and g parameters, a forged q = r (a small prime factor of the
cofactor (p−1)/q_local), and a public value Y of order r can recover the
victim's private key after a small number of key exchange attempts.

When EVP_PKEY_derive_set_peer() is called with a DHX (X9.42) peer key, the
subgroup membership check Y^q ≡ 1 (mod p) is performed using the peer's
own q parameter, not the local key's q. The peer's domain parameters are
then matched against the domain parameters of the private key, but the value
of q is not compared.

A malicious peer who presents an X9.42 key carrying the victim's p, g,
a forged q = r (a small prime factor of the cofactor), and a public
value Y of order r passes all checks. The shared secret then takes only
r distinct values, leaking priv mod r. Repeating for each small-prime
factor of the cofactor and combining via CRT recovers the full private
key (Lim–Lee / small-subgroup-confinement attack).

The realistic attack surface is narrow: principally CMP deployments with
long-lived RA/CA DHX keys and bespoke enterprise or government applications
using X9.42 DHX static keys with interactive protocols and therefore this
issue was assigned Low severity.

The FIPS modules in 4.0, 3.6, 3.5, 3.4, and 3.0 are affected by this
issue.
  
Severity: 0.0 | NA
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...

vulnerability.summary_ko:
CVE ID:CVE-2026-42770
  
게시일 : 2026년 6월 9일 오후 4시 03분 | 34분 전
  
설명:문제 요약: EVP_PKEY_derive_set_peer()가 DHX(X9.42)와 함께 호출되는 경우
피어 키, 피어 키가 하위 그룹 멤버십에 대해 제대로 확인되지 않습니다.

영향 요약: X9.42 키를 제공하는 악성 피어
피해자의 p 및 g 매개변수, a 위조된 q = r(의 작은 소인수)
cofactor (p−1)/q_local), r 차의 공개 값 Y는 다음을 복구할 수 있습니다.
몇 번의 키 교환 시도 후 피해자의 개인 키를 알아냈습니다.

EVP_PKEY_derive_set_peer()가 DHX(X9.42) 피어 키와 함께 호출되면
하위 그룹 멤버십 확인 Y^q pho 1 (mod p)는 피어의 멤버쉽을 사용하여 수행됩니다.
로컬 키의 q가 아닌 자체 q 매개변수입니다. 피어의 도메인 매개변수는 다음과 같습니다.
그런 다음 개인 키의 도메인 매개변수와 일치하지만 값은
q는 비교되지 않습니다.

피해자의 p, g,
위조된 q = r(보조 인자의 작은 소인수), 그리고 공개
주문 r의 값 Y는 모든 검사를 통과합니다. 그런 다음 공유 비밀은 다음과 같습니다.
r 고유 값, priv mod r 누출. 각 소소수에 대해 반복
보조 인자 요소와 CRT를 통한 결합은 전체 개인 정보를 복구합니다.
키(임-리/소규모 하위 그룹 감금 공격).

현실적인 공격 표면은 좁습니다. 주로 CMP 배포를 사용합니다.
수명이 긴 RA/CA DHX 키 및 맞춤형 기업 또는 정부 애플리케이션
대화형 프로토콜과 함께 X9.42 DHX 정적 키를 사용하므로 이는
문제는 심각도 낮음으로 지정되었습니다.

4.0, 3.6, 3.5, 3.4 및 3.0의 FIPS 모듈은 이 영향을 받습니다.

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-49948 - Mem0 0.2.8 Missing Authorization via POST /configure Endpoint
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-49948
  
Published : June 9, 2026, 2:58 p.m. | 1 hour ago
  
Description :Mem0 versions through 0.2.8, fixed in commit ae7f406, contain a missing authorization vulnerability in the self-hosted server component where the POST /configure endpoint modifies global LLM provider and embedder configuration but only verifies authentication via JWT or X-API-Key without validating the caller's role. Any authenticated user holding a distributed API key can redirect all LLM and embedder traffic to an attacker-controlled server, with the malicious configuration persisted to PostgreSQL and surviving server restarts to affect all users and API keys on the instance.
  
Severity: 8.6 | HIGH
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...
vulnerability.title_ko: CVE-2026-49948 - Mem0 0.2.8 POST /configure Endpoint를 통한 승인 누락
vulnerability.summary_ko:
CVE ID:CVE-2026-49948
  
게시일 : 2026년 6월 9일 오후 2시 58분 | 1시간 전
  
설명: 커밋 ae7f406에서 수정된 0.2.8까지의 Mem0 버전에는 POST /configure 엔드포인트가 전역 LLM 공급자 및 포함자 구성을 수정하지만 호출자의 역할을 확인하지 않고 JWT 또는 X-API-Key를 통해서만 인증을 확인하는 자체 호스팅 서버 구성 요소에 누락된 인증 취약점이 포함되어 있습니다. 분산 API 키를 보유하고 있는 인증된 사용자는 모든 LLM 및 임베더 트래픽을 공격자가 제어하는 ​​서버로 리디렉션할 수 있으며, 악성 구성은 PostgreSQL에 유지되고 서버가 다시 시작되어 인스턴스의 모든 사용자 및 API 키에 영향을 미칠 수 있습니다.
  
심각도: 8.6 | 높음
  
  CVSS 세부 정보, 영향을 받는 제품, 타임라인 등과 같은 자세한 내용을 보려면 링크를 방문하세요.

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-24065 - Local Privilege Escalation via Insecure XPC Client Validation in Waves Central for macOS
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-24065
  
Published : June 9, 2026, 2:50 p.m. | 1 hour, 8 minutes ago
  
Description :Waves Central for macOS versions 13.0.9 through 16.5.5 contain a local privilege escalation vulnerability in the privileged helper service. The helper validates connecting XPC clients using the client process identifier (PID) to verify code-signing identity. Because process identifiers can be reused, a local attacker can exploit a race condition between the time a connection request is made and the time the helper performs validation, causing the helper to trust an attacker-controlled process. This allows the attacker to invoke privileged operations, resulting in arbitrary code execution as root. The issue is fixed in version 16.6.2.
  
Severity: 0.0 | NA
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...
vulnerability.title_ko: CVE-2026-24065 - macOS용 Waves Central에서 안전하지 않은 XPC 클라이언트 검증을 통한 로컬 권한 상승
vulnerability.summary_ko:
CVE ID:CVE-2026-24065
  
게시일 : 2026년 6월 9일 오후 2시 50분 | 1시간 8분 전
  
설명: macOS 버전 13.0.9~16.5.5용 Waves Central에는 권한 있는 도우미 서비스에 로컬 권한 에스컬레이션 취약점이 포함되어 있습니다. 도우미는 클라이언트 프로세스 식별자(PID)를 사용하여 XPC 클라이언트 연결을 검증하여 코드 서명 ID를 확인합니다. 프로세스 식별자는 재사용될 수 있으므로 로컬 공격자는 연결 요청이 이루어진 시간과 도우미가 유효성 검사를 수행하는 시간 사이의 경쟁 조건을 악용하여 도우미가 공격자가 제어하는 ​​프로세스를 신뢰하게 만들 수 있습니다. 이를 통해 공격자는 권한 있는 작업을 호출하여 루트로 임의 코드를 실행할 수 있습니다. 이 문제는 버전 16.6.2에서 해결되었습니다.
  
심각도: 0.0 | 해당 없음
  
  CVSS 세부 정보, 영향을 받는 제품, 타임라인 등과 같은 자세한 내용을 보려면 링크를 방문하세요.

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-24064 - Local Privilege Escalation via Dynamic Library Injection in Waves Central for macOS
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-24064
  
Published : June 9, 2026, 2:47 p.m. | 1 hour, 11 minutes ago
  
Description :Waves Central for macOS versions 13.0.9 through 16.5.5 contain a local privilege escalation vulnerability. A trusted XPC client component included with the product is signed with hardened runtime entitlements that permit dynamic library injection. A local attacker can set the DYLD_INSERT_LIBRARIES environment variable to inject an attacker-controlled dynamic library into the trusted client process at launch. The injected code runs within the signed process and can connect to the product's privileged helper service to invoke privileged operations, resulting in arbitrary code execution as root. The issue is fixed in version 16.6.2.
  
Severity: 0.0 | NA
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...
vulnerability.title_ko: CVE-2026-24064 - macOS용 Waves Central의 동적 라이브러리 주입을 통한 로컬 권한 상승
vulnerability.summary_ko:
CVE ID:CVE-2026-24064
  
게시일 : 2026년 6월 9일 오후 2시 47분 | 1시간 11분 전
  
설명: macOS 버전 13.0.9~16.5.5용 Waves Central에는 로컬 권한 상승 취약점이 포함되어 있습니다. 제품에 포함된 신뢰할 수 있는 XPC 클라이언트 구성 요소는 동적 라이브러리 주입을 허용하는 강화된 런타임 자격으로 서명됩니다. 로컬 공격자는 DYLD_INSERT_LIBRARIES 환경 변수를 설정하여 시작 시 공격자가 제어하는 ​​동적 라이브러리를 신뢰할 수 있는 클라이언트 프로세스에 삽입할 수 있습니다. 삽입된 코드는 서명된 프로세스 내에서 실행되며 제품의 권한 있는 도우미 서비스에 연결하여 권한 있는 작업을 호출할 수 있으며 결과적으로 임의 코드가 루트로 실행됩니다. 이 문제는 버전 16.6.2에서 해결되었습니다.

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-9279 - Shell command injection in Logseq
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-9279
  
Published : June 9, 2026, 2:16 p.m. | 21 minutes ago
  
Description :Logseq exposes an IPC handler that allows the renderer process to execute shell commands. While an allowlist restricts the command name (e.g. `git`, `pandoc`, `grep`), the argument string is concatenated with the command and passed to `child_process.spawn` with the `shell: true` option, allowing shell metacharacters in the arguments to bypass the allowlist. An attacker with JavaScript execution in the renderer (e.g. via XSS or a malicious plugin) can execute arbitrary shell commands with the privileges of the Logseq process, leading to remote code execution on the host.
While only version v0.10.15 was tested and confirmed as vulnerable, status of other versions is unknown since this issue was not addressed by a patch.
  
Severity: 8.7 | HIGH
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...
vulnerability.title_ko: CVE-2026-9279 - Logseq에 셸 명령 삽입
vulnerability.summary_ko:
CVE ID:CVE-2026-9279
  
게시일 : 2026년 6월 9일 오후 2시 16분 | 21분 전
  
설명: Logseq는 렌더러 프로세스가 셸 명령을 실행할 수 있도록 하는 IPC 처리기를 노출합니다. 허용 목록은 명령 이름(예: `git`, `pandoc`, `grep`)을 제한하지만 인수 문자열은 명령과 연결되어 `shell: true` 옵션과 함께 `child_process.spawn`에 전달되므로 인수의 셸 메타 문자가 허용 목록을 우회할 수 있습니다. 렌더러에서 JavaScript를 실행하는 공격자는(예: XSS 또는 악성 플러그인을 통해) Logseq 프로세스의 권한으로 임의의 셸 명령을 실행하여 호스트에서 원격 코드를 실행할 수 있습니다.
v0.10.15 버전만 테스트를 거쳐 취약한 것으로 확인되었지만, 이 문제는 패치로 해결되지 않았기 때문에 다른 버전의 상태는 알 수 없습니다.

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-52906 - 9p: fix access mode flags being ORed instead of replaced
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-52906
  
Published : June 9, 2026, 2:16 p.m. | 21 minutes ago
  
Description :In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

9p: fix access mode flags being ORed instead of replaced

Since commit 1f3e4142c0eb ("9p: convert to the new mount API"),
v9fs_apply_options() applies parsed mount flags with |= onto flags
already set by v9fs_session_init(). For 9P2000.L, session_init sets
V9FS_ACCESS_CLIENT as the default, so when the user mounts with
"access=user", both bits end up set. Access mode checks compare
against exact values, so having both bits set matches neither mode.

This causes v9fs_fid_lookup() to fall through to the default switch
case, using INVALID_UID (nobody/65534) instead of current_fsuid()
for all fid lookups. Root is then unable to chown or perform other
privileged operations.

Fix by clearing the access mask before applying the user's choice.
  
Severity: 0.0 | NA
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...
vulnerability.title_ko: CVE-2026-52906 - 9p: 액세스 모드 플래그가 교체되는 대신 OR로 연결되는 문제 수정
vulnerability.summary_ko:
CVE ID:CVE-2026-52906
  
게시일 : 2026년 6월 9일 오후 2시 16분 | 21분 전
  
설명:Linux 커널에서 다음 취약점이 해결되었습니다.

9p: 액세스 모드 플래그가 교체되는 대신 OR로 연결되는 문제 수정

커밋 1f3e4142c0eb("9p: 새 마운트 API로 변환") 이후,
v9fs_apply_options()는 |=를 사용하여 구문 분석된 마운트 플래그를 플래그에 적용합니다.
v9fs_session_init()에 의해 이미 설정되었습니다. 9P2000.L의 경우 session_init가 설정됩니다.
V9FS_ACCESS_CLIENT가 기본값이므로 사용자가 다음을 사용하여 마운트할 때
"access=user", 두 비트 모두 설정됩니다. 액세스 모드 확인 비교
정확한 값과 비교하므로 두 비트를 모두 설정하면 어느 모드와도 일치하지 않습니다.

이로 인해 v9fs_fid_lookup()이 기본 스위치로 넘어갑니다.
이 경우 current_fsuid() 대신 INVALID_UID(nobody/65534)를 사용합니다.
모든 FID 조회에 사용됩니다. 그러면 루트는 chown하거나 다른 작업을 수행할 수 없습니다.
특권적인 작업.

사용자의 선택을 적용하기 전에 액세스 마스크를 지워 문제를 해결하세요.

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-52905 - mm/damon/core: disallow non-power of two min_region_sz on damon_start()
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-52905
  
Published : June 9, 2026, 2:16 p.m. | 21 minutes ago
  
Description :In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

mm/damon/core: disallow non-power of two min_region_sz on damon_start()

Commit d8f867fa0825 ("mm/damon: add damon_ctx->min_sz_region") introduced
a bug that allows unaligned DAMON region address ranges.  Commit
c80f46ac228b ("mm/damon/core: disallow non-power of two min_region_sz")
fixed it, but only for damon_commit_ctx() use case.  Still, DAMON sysfs
interface can emit non-power of two min_region_sz via damon_start().  Fix
the path by adding the is_power_of_2() check on damon_start().

The issue was discovered by sashiko [1].
  
Severity: 0.0 | NA
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...
vulnerability.title_ko: CVE-2026-52905 - mm/damon/core: damon_start()에서 min_region_sz의 2승이 아닌 값을 허용하지 않습니다.

mm/damon/core: damon_start()에서 min_region_sz의 2승이 아닌 값을 허용하지 않습니다.

커밋 d8f867fa0825("mm/damon: damon_ctx->min_sz_region 추가") 도입
정렬되지 않은 DAMON 영역 주소 범위를 허용하는 버그입니다.  커밋
c80f46ac228b ("mm/damon/core: 2의 거듭제곱이 아닌 min_region_sz를 허용하지 않음")
수정했지만 damon_commit_ctx() 사용 사례에만 해당됩니다.  그래도 DAMON sysfs
인터페이스는 damon_start()를 통해 min_region_sz의 2승이 아닌 값을 내보낼 수 있습니다.  수정
damon_start()에 is_power_of_2() 검사를 추가하여 경로를 확인하세요.

이 문제는 sashiko [1]에 의해 발견되었습니다.

vulnerability.title: CVE-2026-52904 - drm/nouveau: fix nvkm_device leak on aperture removal failure
vulnerability.summary:
CVE ID :CVE-2026-52904
  
Published : June 9, 2026, 2:16 p.m. | 21 minutes ago
  
Description :In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

drm/nouveau: fix nvkm_device leak on aperture removal failure

When aperture_remove_conflicting_pci_devices() fails during probe, the
error path returns directly without unwinding the nvkm_device that was
just allocated by nvkm_device_pci_new(). This leaks both the device
wrapper and the pci_enable_device() reference taken inside it.

Jump to the existing fail_nvkm label so nvkm_device_del() runs and
balances both. The leak was introduced when the intermediate
nvkm_device_del() between detection and aperture removal was dropped
in favor of creating the pci device once.
  
Severity: 0.0 | NA
  
  Visit the link for more details, such as CVSS details, affected products, timeline, and more...
vulnerability.title_ko: CVE-2026-52904 - drm/nouveau: 조리개 제거 실패 시 nvkm_device 누출 수정
vulnerability.summary_ko:

drm/nouveau: 조리개 제거 실패 시 nvkm_device 누출 수정

프로브 중에 조리개_제거_충돌_pci_devices()가 실패하면
오류 경로는 nvkm_device를 해제하지 않고 직접 반환됩니다.
nvkm_device_pci_new()에 의해 할당되었습니다. 이로 인해 두 장치가 모두 누출됩니다.
래퍼와 그 내부에서 가져온 pci_enable_device() 참조입니다.

nvkm_device_del()이 실행되고
둘 다의 균형을 유지합니다. 중간 단계에서 누출이 발생했습니다.
감지와 조리개 제거 사이의 nvkm_device_del()이 삭제되었습니다.
pci 장치를 한 번만 만드는 것이 좋습니다.
